top_signals.title: Japan, China lead foreign government retreat from U.S. Treasurys as Gulf War fallout stokes currency fears
top_signals.summary: The selloff came as the outbreak of the U.S.-Iran conflict and resulting surge in crude oil prices sent the Japanese yen and other Asian currencies tumbling.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Goldman Sachs, Moelis Say Business as Usual Amid Iran Conflict
top_signals.summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc.’s international co-heads are visiting the investment bank’s offices around the world in a bid to reassure staff and clients navigating uncertainty following the outbreak of the Iran war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: 2026 CNBC Disruptor 50 list: Why Anthropic was No. 1 in this year's rankings
top_signals.summary: Anthropic, posting explosive growth for its powerful AI systems that enterprises trust, has leapfrogged OpenAI on the CNBC Disruptor 50 list as the new No. 1.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: 2026 CNBC Disruptor 50 list: How we chose this year's companies
top_signals.summary: The 2026 CNBC Disruptor 50 list demonstrates how quickly AI has become essential to disruptive business models across every sector of the economy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Swan Bitcoin sued for nearly $1B over pre-bankruptcy transfers from Prime Trust
top_signals.summary: Swan Bitcoin has been sued for allegedly using insider access to pull nearly $1 billion in Bitcoin and cash from Prime Trust days before its 2023 bankruptcy filing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: DOE issues order to keep Michigan coal-fired power plant operating
top_signals.summary: Order directs J.H. Campbell coal-power plant in West Olive to take all steps necessary to remain available to operate and to minimize costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
